Who I am

Telling stories
that drive change.

I am a Public Relations and Digital Communication specialist and the Communication & Marketing Assistant at Africa Dyslexia Organization — where I manage social media, design newsletters, and run campaigns advocating for inclusive education across Africa.

I am also the Founder of Nyansa Ai — a Ghana-localised AI educational platform for students aged 4–18, built on the GES curriculum and available in seven Ghanaian languages. I built it as a communications student because I saw a gap and refused to wait.

My background spans film production, youth leadership, ambassador and volunteer roles, and a deep personal connection to the causes I work for. I am currently pursuing a top-up BA in Public Relations with Digital Communication at Accra Technical University.
